headline: TRGP Q1 Earnings & Revenues Miss Estimates, Adjusted EBITDA Up Y/Y
summary: TRGP posts record Q1 adjusted EBITDA on strong Permian and fractionation volumes despite revenue and earnings misses.

headline: Are Wall Street Analysts Predicting Targa Resources Stock Will Climb or Sink?
summary: Despite Targa Resources significantly outperforming the broader market over the past year, Wall Street analysts continue to maintain a strongly bullish outlook on the stock’s long-term prospects.
